title: cyperus planifolius
intro: Cyperus planifolius, also known as the flat sedge or umbrella sedge, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral compounds that can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Cyperus planifolius include its ability to aid in the treatment of various health conditions such as diarrhea, dysentery, and respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Cyperus planifolius typically involve drying and powdering the plant's leaves and rhizomes, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal purposes.
